zh.<Of Harringworth,, England>: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯
zh.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothey Capell於大約1481年出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親William Capel36歲，母親Lady Margaret Arundell23歲。她於大約1507年與John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1526年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年46歲。

zh-hans.<Of Harringworth,, England>: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯
zh-hans.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothey Capell于大约1481年出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲William Capel36岁，母亲Lady Margaret Arundell23岁。她于大约1507年与John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1526年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Capell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Chappell ‘chapel’, from a Norman form with hard c-, applied as a topographic or occupational name, or as a habitational name for someone from any of several minor places called with this word, such as Capel in Surrey, Capel le Ferne in Kent, or Capel Saint Andrew and Capel Saint Mary in Suffolk.

English: from Middle English capel, caple, capul(le) ‘stallion, gelding; warhorse, cart horse, riding horse’, denoting someone thought to resemble a horse in some way or possibly someone whose occupation involved horses.
Catalan: from capell ‘hat, hood’, as a nickname for someone who habitually wore a hat or hood, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who made hats or hoods.

variants.name: Cappell
meanings: English: variant of   Capell  .

variants.name: Chappell
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a chapel, from Middle English chapel(l)e ‘chapel’, via Old French, from Late Latin capella, originally a diminutive of capa ‘hood, cloak’, but later transferred to the sense ‘chapel, sanctuary’, with reference to the shrine at Tours where the cloak of Saint Martin was preserved as a relic.

variants.name: Capelle
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): altered form of   Capell  .

French: topographic name for someone living by a chapel, from a regional variant of chapelle ‘chapel’ (compare Chapelle 2), or a habitational name from any of several places named (La) Capelle. This surname is also found in Belgium (mainly Wallonia).
Dutch (also Van Capelle) and Flemish: habitational name for someone from any of various places called Capelle or Kapelle, from Middle Dutch capelle ‘chapel’.

variants.name: Capel
meanings: English: variant of   Capell  .

French: regional variant of Chapel , from a dialect diminutive of Old French chape ‘hooded cloak, cape, hood’, or ‘hat’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of cloaks or hats, or a nickname for a habitual wearer of a distinctive cloak or hat.
Catalan: old variant or Castilianized form of   Capell   ‘hat, hood’, a cognate of 2 above.

variants.name: Cappel
meanings: English: variant of   Capell  .
German and Dutch: variant of   Kappel   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. This surname is also found in northern France and in Alsace and Lorraine (compare 3 below).
French: in some cases also a variant of   Capel  . Compare 2 above.

variants.name: Caple
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Capell  .
Americanized form of German   Kappel   or Dutch   Capel  .

variants.name: Caples
meanings: English (Lancashire and West Rriding of Yorkshire): variant of Capell , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Probably an altered form of Göbbels, a patronymic from Goebel .

variants.name: Capwell
meanings: English (Worcestershire): variant of Capewell, probably a hypercorrect form of Capell .

nameMeanings.name: Dorothey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a post-classical Greek name, from dōron ‘gift’ + theos ‘god’ (the same elements as in Theodora , but in reverse order). The masculine form Dorotheus was borne by several early Christian saints, the feminine by only two minor ones, but only the girl's name has survived. In modern use in the English-speaking world it represents either a 19th-century Latinization of Dorothy or a learned reborrowing.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothey Capell was born about 1481, in London, England, her father, William Capel, was 36 and her mother, Lady Margaret Arundell, was 23. She married John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth about 1507, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1526, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothey Capell est née environ 1481, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, William Capel, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Arundell, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth environ 1507, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1526, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothey Capell um 1481 in London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Capel 36 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Arundell 23. Sie hat um 1507 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1526 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothey Capell è nata il circa 1481 nel London, England, sua padre, William Capel, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Arundell, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth circa 1507, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1526, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.<Of Harringworth,, England>: イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルス
ja.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Dorothey Capellが約1481年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父William Capelは36歳，母Lady Margaret Arundellは23歳であった。約1507年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスでJohn de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1526年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothey Capell(이)가 대략 1481년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Capel(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Arundell(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothey Capell nasceu aproximadamente 1481, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Capel, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Arundell, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth aproximadamente 1507, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1526, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothey Capell родилась около 1481 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Capel было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Arundell, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth около 1507 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1526 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothey Capell nació aproximadamente 1481, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, William Capel, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Arundell, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth aproximadamente 1507, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1526, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
